entries.quoted_snippet: turbopuffer is a fast, object-storage native search engine.

entries.claim_text: Pinecone 提供 managed 與 serverless 部署，儲存與計算分離
entries.quoted_snippet: stored in distributed object storage that provides virtually unlimited scalability and high availability

entries.claim_text: Weaviate 提供 managed／serverless 雲（外加開源自架）
entries.quoted_snippet: We manage everything for you in the Weaviate Cloud

entries.claim_text: Milvus 為開源自架，另有 Zilliz Cloud 全託管
entries.quoted_snippet: a fully managed vector database

entries.claim_text: Qdrant 提供 Managed／Hybrid／Private Cloud 與開源自架
entries.quoted_snippet: Managed Cloud Hybrid Cloud Private Cloud

entries.claim_text: Chroma 為開源自架，另有 Chroma Cloud serverless DBaaS
entries.quoted_snippet: Chroma Cloud - a fast, scalable, and serverless database-as-a-service

entries.claim_text: Elasticsearch 有開源自架、Elastic Cloud 與 Serverless
entries.quoted_snippet: Elastic Cloud Serverless is a fully managed solution that allows you to deploy

entries.claim_text: pgvector 為 Postgres 擴充，自架或任何 managed Postgres 皆可
entries.quoted_snippet: Open-source vector similarity search for Postgres

entries.claim_text: pgvectorscale 為 Postgres 擴充，自架部署（managed 需另找 Postgres 供應商）
entries.quoted_snippet: higher performance embedding search and cost-efficient storage for AI applications

entries.claim_text: LanceDB 可嵌入本機執行，亦有託管雲
entries.quoted_snippet: runs locally or in your cloud

entries.claim_text: Pinecone 用專有索引，官方明言不用 HNSW
entries.quoted_snippet: does not use Hierarchical Navigable Small World (HNSW)

entries.claim_text: Weaviate 有 HNSW、flat 與 dynamic 索引
entries.quoted_snippet: The dynamic index can even start off as a flat index and then dynamically switch to the HNSW index

entries.claim_text: Milvus 同時支援 FLAT／IVF_FLAT／HNSW／DiskANN／ScaNN 等多種 base index
entries.quoted_snippet: IVF_FLAT

entries.claim_text: Qdrant 的向量索引為 HNSW
entries.quoted_snippet: Hierarchical Navigable Small World

entries.claim_text: Chroma 單機使用 HNSW 索引
entries.quoted_snippet: we use an HNSW (Hierarchical Navigable Small World) index to perform

entries.claim_text: Elasticsearch 以 Lucene 的 HNSW 做 kNN 檢索
entries.quoted_snippet: Elasticsearch uses the HNSW algorithm to support efficient kNN search

entries.claim_text: pgvector 提供 HNSW 與 IVFFlat 兩種索引
entries.quoted_snippet: [IVFFlat](#ivfflat)

entries.claim_text: pgvectorscale 新增 StreamingDiskANN 索引
entries.quoted_snippet: A new index type called StreamingDiskANN

entries.claim_text: Weaviate 支援 BQ／PQ／SQ 量化
entries.quoted_snippet: Binary quantization (BQ) Product quantization (PQ) Scalar quantization (SQ)

entries.claim_text: Milvus 支援 Product Quantization 與 Scalar Quantization（IVF_PQ／IVF_SQ8）
entries.quoted_snippet: Product Quantization

entries.claim_text: Qdrant 支援 Scalar／Product／Binary Quantization
entries.quoted_snippet: Binary Quantization

entries.claim_text: Elasticsearch 提供 int8／int4 與 BBQ（bbq_hnsw／bbq_flat／bbq_disk）量化
entries.quoted_snippet: You can choose one of the following BBQ index types: bbq_hnsw bbq_flat bbq_disk

entries.claim_text: pgvector 支援 half-precision（halfvec）與 binary 量化向量型別
entries.quoted_snippet: single-precision, half-precision, binary, and sparse vectors

entries.claim_text: pgvectorscale 配 Statistical Binary Quantization (SBQ)
entries.quoted_snippet: Statistical Binary Quantization

entries.claim_text: Pinecone 單一 index 同時存 dense 與 sparse 向量、一次查詢融合
entries.quoted_snippet: a single index that stores both a dense vector and a sparse vector per record, queried together in one request

entries.claim_text: Weaviate 以 RRF 併稠密向量與關鍵字兩路，是真 hybrid
entries.quoted_snippet: vector search and a keyword search in parallel

entries.claim_text: Milvus 融合 BM25 sparse 與 dense 向量做 hybrid
entries.quoted_snippet: combines sparse vectors of BM25 with dense vectors

entries.claim_text: Qdrant 以 RRF 融合 dense 與 sparse 向量做 hybrid
entries.quoted_snippet: combine dense and sparse vectors to get the best of both worlds

entries.claim_text: Chroma Cloud 以 RRF 融合 dense 與 sparse 做 hybrid
entries.quoted_snippet: combine multiple ranking strategies using Reciprocal Rank Fusion (RRF)

entries.claim_text: Chroma OSS 核心的 full-text 僅是 $contains／$not_contains 過濾，非 dense+BM25 融合
entries.quoted_snippet: We support full-text search with the $contains and $not_contains operators

entries.claim_text: Elasticsearch 用 RRF 融合 BM25 與 dense 檢索
entries.quoted_snippet: documents from a traditional BM25 query and an ELSER query to achieve improved relevance

entries.claim_text: pgvector 原生不做 BM25 融合，README 指向 Postgres 全文檢索
entries.quoted_snippet: Use together with Postgres

entries.claim_text: pgvectorscale 同 pgvector，無原生 BM25 融合
entries.quoted_snippet: Use together with Postgres

entries.claim_text: Turbopuffer 提供 vector＋full-text 的 hybrid search
entries.quoted_snippet: Combine vector and full-text search

entries.claim_text: LanceDB 支援 vector＋full-text＋SQL 檢索
entries.quoted_snippet: vector similarity search, full-text search and SQL

entries.claim_text: Pinecone 官方安全文件逐字寫 uses role-based access controls (RBAC)
entries.quoted_snippet: Pinecone uses role-based access controls (RBAC) to manage access to resources

entries.claim_text: Weaviate 支援 RBAC 依角色限制存取
entries.quoted_snippet: If role-based access control (RBAC) is enabled, access can be further restricted

entries.claim_text: Milvus 支援 Role-Based Access Control (RBAC)
entries.quoted_snippet: Role-Based Access Control (RBAC)

entries.claim_text: Qdrant 以 JWT 鋪陳 granular access control（RBAC）
entries.quoted_snippet: granular access control using JSON Web Tokens (JWT)

entries.claim_text: Elasticsearch 主要授權方式為 role-based access control (RBAC)
entries.quoted_snippet: The primary method of authorization in a cluster is role-based access control (RBAC)

entries.claim_text: pgvector 為 Postgres 擴充，RBAC 繼承 Postgres 角色系統

entries.quoted_snippet: bbq_hnsw bbq_flat bbq_disk

entries.quoted_snippet: A new index type called StreamingDiskANN

entries.claim_text: pgvectorscale 的 StreamingDiskANN 把圖索引落盤（DiskANN）
entries.quoted_snippet: StreamingDiskANN, inspired by the [DiskANN](https://github.com/microsoft/DiskANN) algorithm

entries.claim_text: Turbopuffer 是 object-storage native 的檢索引擎
entries.quoted_snippet: turbopuffer is a fast, object-storage native search engine.

entries.claim_text: LanceDB 建於 Lance 列式格式（落盤）
entries.quoted_snippet: It is built on top of the Lance columnar format.
